CustomField.description: Used to determine the Stage Name to advance to
CustomField.formula:
/*This evaluates all missing fields a to determine stage to be at*/ /*IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"1"), "Stage 1 - Create/Plan", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"2"), "Stage 2 - Qualify", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"3"), "Stage 3 - Develop", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"4"), "Stage 4 - Prove", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"5"), "Stage 5 - Negotiation", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"CW:"), "Closed Won", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"CL:"), "Closed Lost", IF( CONTAINS(fxMissingFieldsstageAll__c,"Aban"), "Abandonded" , TEXT(StageName) )))))))) */
CASE( fxStageNumberToAdvance__c , 1, "Stage 1 - Create/Plan" , 2, "Stage 2 - Qualify" , 3, "Stage 3 - Develop" , 4, "Stage 4 - Prove" , 5, "Stage 5 - Negotiation" , 6, "Stage 6 - Implement" , 7, "Closed Won" , 8, "Closed Lost" , 9, "Abandonded" , Text(StageName) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Used to determine the Stage Name to advance to
CustomField.label: fxStageNameToAdvance
